chunks.title: Israel Forsakes Yahweh and Shishak Attacks
chunks.reason: Describes the apostasy of Rehoboam and the subsequent invasion by Shishak king of Egypt.

chunks.title: Shemaiah's Oracle and the King's Humbling
chunks.reason: Contains the prophet's message from Yahweh and the king's response of humility.

chunks.title: Looting of Jerusalem and Replacement of Shields
chunks.reason: Details the plundering of the temple and palace treasures and the making of bronze shields.

chunks.title: Rehoboam's Reign Summary and Death
chunks.reason: Summarizes the king's reign, character, sources of history, and his death.
